description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a fenced rectangular plot featuring a spacious green lawn, a swimming pool, and a driveway leading to a detached double garage. The building has a flat roof and large windows, with a clean, geometric layout and open-plan interior visible through the cutaway. The property is landscaped with several trees and shrubs, including flowering trees and manicured hedges, and is bordered by wooden fencing. The backyard includes a pool area with a paved surround and a small patio, while the front yard is open with a direct path to the main entrance. The garage is positioned at the rear corner of the lot, accessible via a driveway that runs along the side of the house. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces, modern materials, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a swimming pool, and a detached double garage, set within a landscaped, fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, manicured front lawn, and partial view of the detached garage at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the driveway, and the double garage at the rear, with visible landscaping and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and the garage, with flowering trees and fencing along the perimeter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and more of the backyard landscaping, with the front yard and driveway partially visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
